headline: BofA Just Picked FedEx Stock as One of Its Best Ideas: Logistics Giant Joins the US 1 List
summary: Bank of America has added FedEx (NYSE:FDX) to its “US 1 List,” a collection of its best investment ideas. The move, announced May 11, is a high-conviction symbolic signal even without a fresh price target attached. For long-term investors, the inclusion reframes FedEx stock as one of Wall Street’s preferred industrial transformation plays heading into ... BofA Just Picked FedEx Stock as One of Its Best Ideas: Logistics Giant Joins the US 1 List

headline: Postal Service hires former UPS logistics exec as chief strategy officer
summary: The U.S. Postal Service has selected a former UPS executive as chief strategy officer. The post Postal Service hires former UPS logistics exec as chief strategy officer appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: UPS and FedEx up international fuel surcharge rates, add surge fees
summary: The changes impact various import and export shipments, including packages traveling to and from the U.S., adding to cost pressures for parcel shippers.

headline: A Look At United Parcel Service (UPS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Gains And Margin Transition Plans
summary: Recent performance snapshot United Parcel Service (UPS) has seen mixed share performance recently, with the stock edging up about 0.7% over the past day and gaining roughly 4.6% over the past week, while showing declines over the month and the past 3 months. headline: Chris Sununu on rising jet fuel costs: Airlines are only passing a small portion onto the customer
summary: Chris Sununu, Airlines for America president and CEO and former New Hampshire governor, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the state of the airline industry, impact of rising jet fuel prices on airfares, and more.
